# Annual Performance by Stat Category {#sec-annualPerformance}

This chapter covers annual player performance across key statistical categories.

## Passing {#sec-annualPassing}

### Pass Attempts {#sec-annualPassAttempts}

#### Completed Pass {#sec-annualCompletedPass}

#### Incomplete Pass {#sec-annualIncompletePass}

#### Interceptions {#sec-annualInterceptions}

#### Pass TDs {#sec-annualPassTDs}

### Pass Yardage {#sec-annualPassYardage}

#### Air Yards {#sec-annualAirYards}

#### Passing Yards {#sec-annualPassingYards}

#### YAC {#sec-annualYAC}

### Passing Metrics {#sec-annualPassingMetrics}

#### CP {#sec-annualCP}

#### CPOE {#sec-annualCPOE}

### Passer Play {#sec-annualPasserPlay}

#### Dropback {#sec-annualDropback}

#### Hits {#sec-annualHits}

#### Sacks {#sec-annualSacks}

#### Pass_oe {#sec-annualPassOE}

#### xpass {#sec-annualXpass}

## Rushing {#sec-annualRushing}

## Receiving {#sec-annualReceiving}

## Kicking {#sec-annualKicking}

## Offensive Line Play {#sec-annualOLine}

## Defensive Play {#sec-annualDefense}
